## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Link to the relevant task in DEVELOPMENT_PLAN.md if applicable. -->
<!-- Example: Implements task 0.5 — waka-api summaries endpoint -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, CI
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `BREAKING CHANGE` — requires MAJOR version bump

## Changes Made

<!-- List the key changes. Be specific. -->

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? Which tests were added? -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Snapshot tests approved (`cargo insta review`)
- [ ] Manual end-to-end test performed

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` applied
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo nextest run` passes
- [ ] `cargo doc --no-deps` passes without warnings
- [ ] New public API items have doc comments
- [ ] `DEVELOPMENT_PLAN.md` updated (tasks checked off)
- [ ] `SPEC.md` referenced for any user-facing behavior
- [ ] No API key or credentials appear in code or tests
- [ ] Exit codes follow the spec (`SPEC.md §Annexe B`)
